task_completion.description: Navigate to the Emoncms Admin Users page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost/admin/users, or the Emoncms interface clearly shows the Admin -> Users section.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new user
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New User' form, dialog, or modal is displayed on the screen within the Emoncms interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the target username and email
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'john_doe' is entered in the username input field and 'john.doe@example.com' is entered in the email input field.
The password field is filled (either visible as 'JohnDoe123' or masked with dots) in the new user form.

task_completion.description: Submit the form to create the user
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save', 'Create', or 'Register' button to submit the new user form.

task_completion.description: Verify the new user appears in the user list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Emoncms user list displays the newly created user 'john_doe' along with the email 'john.doe@example.com'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to create the user
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser (clicking, typing in forms) rather than using terminal commands like curl or mysql to insert the user.

integrity.description: The interaction occurred within the actual Emoncms application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show http://localhost and the Emoncms interface should be visible, not a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: The final user list was not faked using browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the browser's Inspect Element / Developer Tools being used to artificially insert the user's details into the HTML DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Emoncms application is accessible at http://localhost. The admin users page is located at http://localhost/admin/users. The new user must have the username 'john_doe', email 'john.doe@example.com', and password 'JohnDoe123'. Emoncms requires passwords to be 4-250 characters, which 'JohnDoe123' satisfies.
